title: How Much Is It?
description: Asking prices, discounts, paying. How MUCH for money, how MANY for items.
summary_pt_br: Perguntas sobre preço: HOW MUCH para dinheiro/incontável, HOW MANY para contável. 'How much is this?' / 'How many do you want?' Vocabulário: discount, on sale, receipt, cash, card.

turns.en: It's 25 dollars. It's on sale — 30% off.
turns.pt: 25 dólares. Tá em promoção — 30% de desconto.

scenes.title: How much vs How many
scenes.body_en: HOW MUCH + uncountable / money. 'How much is it?' 'How much milk?' HOW MANY + countable plural. 'How many shirts?' 'How many people?' For money, always HOW MUCH (money is uncountable).
scenes.body_pt: HOW MUCH + incontável/dinheiro. HOW MANY + contável plural. Dinheiro é SEMPRE how much.

examples.en: How much is it? / How many apples?

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "How Much Is It?". Asking prices, discounts, paying. How MUCH for money, how MANY for items. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "How Much Is It?". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'How Much Is It?'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "How Much Is It?".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
